name: Assets Vehicle Decommission Process
description: Assets management process for vehicle decommissioning and equipment recovery

steps.title: Equipment Inventory and Removal
steps.description: Inventory and remove all company equipment from vehicle

substeps.title: Inventory all vehicle equipment
substeps.description: Complete inventory of all company equipment installed in vehicle

substeps.title: Remove all company equipment
substeps.description: Safely remove all company-owned equipment from vehicle

substeps.title: Document equipment condition
substeps.description: Document condition of all removed equipment

substeps.title: Secure sensitive equipment
substeps.description: Properly secure and account for any sensitive or high-value equipment

steps.title: Asset Processing and Documentation
steps.description: Process recovered assets and update tracking systems

substeps.title: Update asset tracking system
substeps.description: Update asset tracking with recovered equipment status

substeps.title: Determine equipment disposition
substeps.description: Determine whether equipment will be redeployed, repaired, or disposed

steps.title: Final Asset Reconciliation
steps.description: Complete final reconciliation of all assets

substeps.title: Generate asset recovery report
substeps.description: Create comprehensive report of all recovered assets
